title: Reaper_resource update_Reaped souls display.

panes.label: Reaped souls count
panes.notes:
This has an anti-statement pressence (Shows when missing, desaturates)

This counts how many stacks you have of the main resource in a flattened manner. It sits next to the lesser resource as it's acculmative value as the game dictates. 

(Soul fragment, at 3 =1 reaped soul. )

review.humanIntent: Mirrors Reaper's currently shipped Pane layout, for reference while sketching - not itself the source of truth (inventory.py is).

notes.labs:
Verified 2026-07-06 against a real in-game group export (!WA:2! string, class group "Resources_reaper", 8 children) via weakaura_codec.py's decode_group_import_string(). Cast Bar/Cast Bar Backing, Swing Timer/Swing Timer Backing, Resources Divider, and Runic Power all matched Tiers/resources_base.py's CAST_BAR_POS/SWING_TIMER_POS/DIVIDER_POS/CLASS_ENERGY_POS exactly - no drift there.

Soul Fragment and the new tracker pane (here 'Reaped souls count', in-game 'Reaped Soul_tracker') both matched this sketch's own grid positions (Soul Fragment x=-79.5/width=96, tracker x=-16.5/width=30, flush at the seam) - confirming this sketch already captures the real in-game resize/composition correctly. The one thing this sketch can't hold: BOTH of those two elements' real y is -152.2646795432088, not a clean -152.5 - a small (~0.24 unit) drag-precision artifact, expected and fine to round to -152.5 when this gets formalized into Reaper/inventory.py, not a design problem.

Separately, the real group's own frame anchor carries yOffset=-18 (xOffset=0, CENTER/SCREEN) - every child's LOCAL position matches spec exactly, but the whole group sits 18 units lower on screen than Tiers/resources_base.py's numbers assume (effectively yOffset=0). This is a group-level placement choice, not a per-element error - worth carrying forward whenever the base files get updated, per Battlewrath: 'a change we'll do later to the base files.'

screenNote: Imported snapshot of Reaper/inventory.py - re-import to refresh, do not hand-edit and expect it to propagate back.
